title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 3: The Yoga of Action
description: Chapter 3 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna explains karma yoga: perform your duty without attachment to results.
introduction: Chapter 3 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna explains karma yoga: perform your duty without attachment to results.

translation.text: You have the right to action alone, never to its fruits. Do not let the fruit of action be your motive.
